Agentic AI flight tracking

Track the sky, remember yours.

AeroNav

Start with the flight you mean.

Ask the copilot for a route, a friend's flight, a delay check, or the aircraft overhead. AeroNav verifies live data before it answers.

View the copilot See your sky log

Private memory layer

Account for your sky.

AeroNav keeps a private logbook of every aircraft you inspect: routes, altitude records, favorite airlines, rare moments, streaks, and the miles you earn by coming back.

Live globe EK229
Dubai
Seattle
Copilot prompt

"Track my friend's flight from Dubai to Seattle on Emirates."

Captain's Club Rank unlocked
Flight verified No guessing

AeroNav

Live aircraft. 3D globe. Agentic copilot.

The magic moment

Just say the flight you mean.

A friend texts, "Just boarded in Dubai, see you tonight in Seattle." You do not need the flight number. AeroNav checks live schedules, aircraft positions, route timing, and airline data until it can prove the match.

If it knows, the map glides to the real aircraft and follows it. If it does not know, it says so.

Copilot check Verified live
Track my friend's flight from Dubai to Seattle on Emirates.
I found the active Emirates Dubai to Seattle flight and confirmed the aircraft against live position data.
Following EK229 now. Estimated landing: 9h 42m.
Dubai
Seattle

The difference

Your personal sky builds itself.

FlightRadar24 shows what is happening now. AeroNav adds memory: every plane you inspect becomes part of your private logbook, with lifetime stats, streaks, ranks, and rare moments worth keeping.

01

Lifetime logbook

Remember every aircraft you have ever opened, from late-night long-hauls to the tiny regional jet overhead.

12,480 miles earned
02

Ranks and streaks

Open the app daily to earn miles and climb from Economy to Captain's Club.

03

Highest plane spotted

A running record of the highest aircraft you have tracked, the airline, the route, and where you were when you found it.

43,000 ft
04

Airlines you see most

Your most-seen carriers become a tiny fingerprint of your local sky.

Live tracking stack

Everything expected. One thing no tracker has.

Route

Tap any aircraft

Route, altitude, speed, aircraft type, and time remaining to destination.

Weather

Sky layers

Weather overlays help explain holds, diversions, and airport delays.

Alerts

Emergency signal

Instant alerts when an aircraft declares an emergency or a tracked flight changes status.

Search

Smart narrowing

Type a flight, airport, airline, city, or natural-language intent and AeroNav tightens the result set.

Memory

The personal layer

Flight history, highest spots, favorite airlines, streaks, badges, and private stats that belong to you.

Positioning

Built for people who look up every time a plane flies over.

The market already knows live flight maps. AeroNav earns attention by turning the sky into a personal, conversational, collectible place.

Experience FlightRadar24 AeroNav
Live aircraft map Strong Strong, with 3D globe focus
Voice-first tracking Search driven Natural AI copilot
Personal history Limited Private memory and logbook
Delight loop Observation Miles, ranks, badges, rare aircraft moments

Where it goes next

A flight tracker that starts talking before you ask.

Next

Collectible badges

Spot a one-of-a-kind cargo giant overhead and the app celebrates it with you.

Next

Boarding-pass stat cards

Share your personal sky as a polished card: streak, miles, airports, and rare aircraft seen.

Later

Proactive copilot

It speaks first when a flight you care about takes off, lands, delays, or changes route.

Later

Replay mode

Rewind your own sky and watch the flights you followed move again across the globe.

AeroNav Other apps show you the sky. AeroNav remembers yours.

Free, ad-free, and built with private on-device history for aviation lovers.
